_comment: Edit this file to customise venues, time windows, and notification settings.

venues.name: Highbury Fields Tennis Courts
venues._note: Highbury Fields outdoor courts are listed under the islington-parks venue. If no tennis slots appear, try changing timetable_url to end in /highbury/timetable instead.

_telegram_note: Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN as a GitHub repo secret. Chat ID is already stored above.
